summary: E2E testing of FlowSpace 11-section questionnaire + GridFS photo upload. Backend (7/7 pytest) and Frontend (full questionnaire flow, modal CTAs, /intake full page, trilingual switching, photo upload, admin display) all pass. No critical or minor functional bugs found.

issues: Console accessibility warnings: 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle for screen reader users' and 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined}'. The visible heading is rendered as a plain <h2>, not as DialogTitle/DialogDescription primitives. Wrap with VisuallyHidden or use DialogTitle/DialogDescription to satisfy Radix a11y.

action_items: (A11y, low priority) Add <DialogTitle> + <DialogDescription> (or VisuallyHidden wrapper) in QuestionnaireModal.jsx to clear Radix accessibility warnings on every modal open.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/leads returns 200 (not 201) on creation. Functionally fine since response_model=Lead, but per REST convention create endpoints should return 201. Not a blocker.
GridFS photos are streamed every request with no ETag — Cache-Control immutable is set so browsers cache, but a server-side ETag would help reverse proxies.
Questionnaire 'Submit' button is correctly disabled when contact step is invalid (good UX). Validation also blocks Next on Section 1 (space_type required).

Photo upload endpoint correctly validates content-type startswith 'image/' and rejects >10MB with 413. Empty file returns 400. Invalid ObjectId returns 400, non-existent valid ObjectId returns 404 — all per spec.

Admin lead row displays all questionnaire chips with translated labels and the GridFS image loads successfully (naturalWidth=100 verified) via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL + relative /api/uploads/photo/{id} URL.
seed_data_creation: Created 3 test leads via E2E: TEST_QuestionnaireUser (full questionnaire with photo, garage/standard pkg), TEST_FE_E2E (minimal /intake submission, closet, with photo), TEST_E2E User (partial submission attempt). Also 2 standalone photo uploads via pytest. All photos persisted in GridFS bucket 'uploads' and successfully retrieved via GET /api/uploads/photo/{id}.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 13 requested test cases pass end-to-end. Backend: photo upload (multipart, 200/{id,url}), rejects non-image (400), rejects >10MB (413), invalid id (400/404), POST /api/leads accepts all new questionnaire fields, GET /api/admin/leads with X-Admin-Token returns all fields preserved. Frontend: hero-cta-start + header-cta-start both open [data-testid=questionnaire-modal], 11 sections render with progress bar updating from 9% to 100%, forward/back navigation preserves state, max-3 enforcement works via disabled-chip pattern (no toast needed since UI disables 4th chip), photo upload via multipart works (thumb visible + image loaded), contact validation via disabled submit button, /intake renders Questionnaire as full page (no modal), ES (Sección 1 de 11) and PT (Seção 1 de 11) translations work, admin /admin/login with garage2025 succeeds, admin dashboard lead row displays all questionnaire chips (clutter, no storage, stressful, calm, minimal, airy, shelves, bins, modern, scandi, white, wood, some) + must_stay text + daily_improvement text + GridFS photo (naturalWidth>0). Only finding: Radix Dialog a11y console warning about missing DialogTitle/Description — cosmetic, non-blocking.
